source.name: Vercel
source.description: Official directory of Vercel published skills. Each skill is verified, documented, and ready to integrate, so you can quickly add powerful new capabilities to your agents.

skills.name: vercel-react-best-practices
skills.description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines with 40+ rules across 8 categories

skills.name: vercel-composition-patterns
skills.description: React composition patterns that scale, helping avoid boolean prop proliferation

skills.name: vercel-react-native-skills
skills.description: React Native best practices with 16 rules covering performance, architecture, and platform-specific patterns

skills.name: next-best-practices
skills.description: Next.js best practices covering file conventions, RSC boundaries, data patterns, and more

skills.name: next-cache-components
skills.description: Next.js 16 Cache Components and PPR for mixing static, cached, and dynamic content

skills.name: next-upgrade
skills.description: Upgrade Next.js to the latest version using official migration guides and codemods

skills.name: cra-to-next-migration
skills.description: Comprehensive guide for converting Create React App projects to Next.js

skills.name: turborepo
skills.description: Build system guide for JavaScript and TypeScript monorepos with task caching and parallel execution

skills.name: ai-sdk
skills.description: Answer questions about the AI SDK and help build AI-powered features including agents, chatbots, and RAG systems

skills.name: ai-elements
skills.description: Component library built on shadcn/ui for AI-native applications

skills.name: streamdown
skills.description: Streaming-optimized React Markdown renderer with built-in security

skills.name: web-design-guidelines
skills.description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance with 100+ rules covering accessibility, performance, and UX

skills.name: building-components
skills.description: Guidance on building UI components with accessibility, composable APIs, and theming

skills.name: agent-browser
skills.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents including navigation, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction

skills.name: vercel-deploy
skills.description: Deploy applications and websites to Vercel instantly with framework auto-detection for 40+ frameworks

skills.name: vercel-cli
skills.description: Deploy, manage, and develop projects on Vercel from the command line

skills.name: autoship
skills.description: Automated releases with repository cloning, AI-powered changeset generation, and npm publishing

skills.name: ucp
skills.description: Universal Commerce Protocol for checkout sessions, payments, and commerce operations

skills.name: workflow
skills.description: Durable, resilient async functions with retry logic and step-based orchestration

skills.name: json-render-core
skills.description: Core package for schema definition, catalog creation, and spec streaming

skills.name: json-render-react
skills.description: React renderer that converts JSON specs into React component trees

skills.name: json-render-react-native
skills.description: React Native renderer for JSON specs with standard components and data binding

skills.name: json-render-remotion
skills.description: Remotion renderer that turns JSON timeline specs into videos

skills.name: remotion-best-practices
skills.description: Best practices for Remotion video creation in React with 30+ rule files

skills.name: find-skills
skills.description: Discover and install agent skills from the skills.sh directory

skills.name: before-and-after
skills.description: Screenshot comparison tool for capturing before/after states of web pages
